source.sourcePath: raw/sources/Project/02_CYAN/4. 시험소 제출자료(601-1)/6. Usability/A-USEP-CYN_Usability Summative Evaluation Plan (Rev.0 250901).docx

sourceSummary.oneLine: Plan for summative usability evaluation of the GT Series Digital Flat Panel X-ray Detector models GT1717C and GT1717CP.
sourceSummary.officialUse: Included in H&ABIZ Co., Ltd.'s medical device usability engineering file and used to define the evaluation method, user interface components, test implementation plan, data collection, and analysis for summative usability testing.
keyPoints: The plan aims to identify and understand usage errors, potential risks, and root causes through actual use and observation under actual usage conditions.
The product is identified as Digital Flat Panel X-ray Detector, model names GT1717C and GT1717CP.
The two product variants differ only in CsI deposition thickness and are stated to be identical in usability.
Summative usability testing is planned for 15 radiologist participants from 2025.09.01 to 2025.09.15.
Reference standards include IEC 62366-1, IEC TR 62366-2, IEC 60601-1-6, EN ISO 14971, and ISO TR 24971.

evidence.claim: The summative evaluation plan establishes the evaluation method, identifies user interface components, and establishes the test implementation plan.

evidence.claim: The ultimate goal is to identify usage errors, potential risks, and root causes under actual usage conditions.
evidence.evidenceText: The ultimate goal is to identify and understand usage errors, potential risks, and root causes through actual use and observation of users under actual usage conditions of the Digital Flat Panel X-ray Detector (Model no. GT1717C, GT1717CP).

evidence.claim: GT1717C and GT1717CP differ only in CsI deposition thickness and are identical in usability.
evidence.evidenceText: The two products differ only in CsI deposition thickness, as shown below, and are identical in usability. - GT1717C : 300um - GT1717CP : 500um

evidence.claim: The applied standards listed in the document overview are IEC 62366-1:2015 and IEC 60601-1-6.
evidence.evidenceText: Applied standards: IEC 62366-1:2015 & IEC 60601-1-6

evidence.claim: The reference standards include IEC 62366-1:2015/AMD1:2020, IEC TR 62366-2:2016, IEC 60601-1-6:2010/AMD2:2020, EN ISO 14971:2019, and ISO TR 24971:2020.
evidence.evidenceText: Reference standard참조 규격 Standard Descriptions IEC 62366-1:2015/AMD1:2020 ... IEC TR 62366-2:2016 ... IEC 60601-1-6:2010/AMD2:2020 ... EN ISO 14971:2019 ... ISO TR 24971:2020

evidence.claim: The test type is summative evaluation and the test method is usability test.
evidence.evidenceText: Test Type Summative Evaluation 총괄 평가 Test Method Usability test 사용적합성 시험

evidence.claim: The test period is planned from 2025.09.01 to 2025.09.15.
The usability test includes 15 participants classified as radiologists.
evidence.evidenceText: Number of Participants 15 User (Participant) Classification Radiologist 방사선사

evidence.claim: The intended users are participants aged 30s to 40s with occupation radiographer and major radiography.
evidence.evidenceText: Age group연령대 30~40대 Occupation직업 Radiographer방사선사 Major전공 Radiography방사선

evidence.claim: The product classification is stated as Class llb (2등급).
evidence.evidenceText: Classification 등급 Class llb (2등급)

evidence.claim: The stated intended use is digital imaging for general radiographic diagnosis of adult and children human anatomy and not for mammography.
evidence.evidenceText: The HnX-R1(Digital X-ray Imaging System) is indicated for digital imaging solution designed for providing general radiographic diagnosis of human anatomy targeting both adult and children. It is intended to replace film based radiographic diagnostic system. Not to be used for mammography.
evidence.pageTarget: Digital X-ray Imaging System Intended Use

evidence.claim: The detector is described as a wired digital flat panel x-ray detector used with TFT glass and scintillator.
evidence.evidenceText: This is a wired digital flat panel x-ray detector, a faster and more efficient digital radiography system. The detector is used in combination with a TFT glass and scintillator
evidence.pageTarget: Digital Flat Panel X-ray Detector Technology

evidence.claim: Test locations include Hope Hospital and Samyuk Seoul Hospital.
evidence.evidenceText: Institution Name기관명 Hope Hospital 희망찬병원 ... Samyuk Seoul Hospital 삼육서울병원

evidence.claim: Evaluation environment conditions include lighting 600 Lux to 800 Lux, noise 40 dB to 60 dB, temperature 18 ℃ to 23 ℃, and humidity 50% to 55%.
evidence.evidenceText: Lighting조명 600 Lux ~800 Lux Noise소음 40 dB ~ 60 dB Temperature온도 18 ℃~ 23 ℃ Humidity습도 50 % ~ 55 %

evidence.claim: The selected risk-related usage scenarios include checking the user manual, preparing the product for use, product use, and maintenance.
evidence.evidenceText: Use scenarios related to risk factors 1: Check User Manual ... Use scenarios related to risk factors2: Preparing the product for use ... Use scenarios related to risk factors 3: Product use ... Use scenarios related to risk factors 4: Maintenance

evidence.claim: Risk-related tasks include reading the user manual and understanding functions and usage, familiarizing with safety warnings, connecting components, calibration, power ON/OFF, indicator check, transportation, patient positioning, and cleaning.
evidence.evidenceText: Read the user manual and understand the functions and usage ... Familiarize yourself with the safety warnings ... Connect product components ... Product calibration ... Product power ON/OFF ... Check the indicator ... Product transportation ... Place the patient's imaging area on the detector ... Cleaning method and verification of cleaning results

evidence.claim: Data collection includes objective data such as scenario completion, re-performance count, task completion time, usage errors, and unexpected usage errors.
evidence.evidenceText: Objective data collection methods can be whether the usage scenario was completed, the number of times it was re-performed, the time it took to complete the task, the usage errors that occurred, and the unexpected usage errors.

evidence.claim: Subjective data include participant interview opinions and observer-observed opinions.
evidence.evidenceText: Subjective data are the opinions of the participants based on the participant interview and the opinions observed by the observer.

evidence.claim: Usage errors are defined as failure to complete a task or completion of a task incorrectly.
evidence.evidenceText: Failure to complete a task or complete a task incorrectly.

evidence.claim: The participant's understanding of product-name information and IFU information is checked through comprehension questions.
evidence.evidenceText: The participant's understanding of the information displayed in the product name and the information included in the IFU is checked through comprehension questions.

evidence.claim: Related attached documents are Participant Consent Form and Participant comments and evaluation form.
evidence.evidenceText: Attachment 1. Participant Consent Form붙임 1. 참여자 동의서 Attachment 2. Participant comments and evaluation form 붙임 2. 참여자 의견 및 평가서

reviewFlags.reason: No external regulatory authority or jurisdiction is identified in the source text; authorityOrJurisdiction is left empty.
The intended-use section names HnX-R1(Digital X-ray Imaging System), while the document title and product fields identify Digital Flat Panel X-ray Detector models GT1717C and GT1717CP.
The classification text states 'Class llb (2등급)', which may reflect ambiguous OCR or mixed classification terminology.
The preprocessed text flattens tables and bilingual content, so some table relationships may require source-document verification.
